Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that are part of cases ending with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' compared to the frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Accepted + In Progress' for cases where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' occurrences relative to the total occurrences of 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Number of variants containing at least two consecutive 'Accepted + In Progress' activities before reaching 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of all 'Completed + In Call' instances that are immediately preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' in cases with impact level 'High', 'Medium', or 'Low'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of process variants starting with 'Accepted + In Progress' that include 'Completed + In Call' as a terminal activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of the number of 'Accepted + In Progress' executions to the number of 'Completed + Closed' executions
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average number of 'Accepted + In Progress' occurrences per case that ends with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that are not followed by any waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', etc.) before 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' in the most common variant leading to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of total activity executions represented by 'Accepted + In Progress' in variants that do not contain 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all cases where 'Completed + Resolved' does not happen

Name: Number of times 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs without being preceded by 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' in cases ending with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Accepted + In Progress' appears more than once before 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of variants containing 'Accepted + In Progress → Completed + In Call' to all variants containing 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' grouped by product type for cases ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities grouped by the last value of product filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'
